posts.title: Brand Intro — What is Dessertino?
posts.caption:
Pune, your new dessert obsession just dropped 🍦

Thick shakes that hit different. Ice cream that makes you stop scrolling. Waffles that make you forget your diet.

Welcome to Dessertino — Shakes and More.

📍 Dine-in | 🛵 Delivery

Tag someone who NEEDS to try this 👇
posts.visualDirection: Fast cuts, cinematic close-ups of pouring shakes, drizzling chocolate, waffle plating. Sky blue + pink overlay on text. Mascot reveal at end. Trending upbeat audio. 15-30s.
posts.productionNotes: REEL #1 — First impression matters. Shoot all hero products in one session. Use brand mascot in end card.

posts.title: Top 5 Must-Try Thick Shakes
posts.caption:
Which one are you grabbing first? 👇

Swipe through Dessertino's top 5 thick shakes that Pune can't stop ordering 🥤

From classic chocolate overload to fruity madness — there's a shake for every mood.

💬 Drop your pick in the comments!
📍 Order now on Swiggy/Zomato or walk in
posts.visualDirection: 5 slides. Slide 1: Bold hook text 'Top 5 Shakes You NEED to Try' on pink brand bg. Slides 2-5: One shake per slide — product photo on solid brand color bg (alternate blue/pink). Name + price overlay. Slide 6: CTA + logo.
posts.productionNotes: CAROUSEL — Shoot each shake individually with consistent lighting. Use brand bg colors. Include pricing if client approves.

posts.title: POV: You walk into Dessertino
posts.caption:
POV: You finally found the dessert spot everyone's been talking about 😍

That first sip >>> everything else.

📍 Dessertino — Shakes and More
🛵 Also on Swiggy & Zomato

Save this for your next craving 🔖
posts.visualDirection: Handheld POV style. Walk-in shot → look around store → scan menu → order at counter → wait → first sip reaction (satisfied close-up). Natural lighting, immersive feel. Trending audio. 20-40s.
posts.productionNotes: REEL #2 — Needs store access. Film during quieter hours for clean shots. Capture real ambiance.

posts.title: Hero Product Shot — Signature Shake
posts.caption:
This isn't just a shake. It's a whole mood. 🤤

Dessertino's signature thick shake — crafted to perfection, served to impress.

One sip and you'll know why Pune is obsessed.

📍 Dessertino — Shakes and More
🛵 Order now | 🪑 Dine in
posts.visualDirection: Dark/moody background. Dramatic side lighting. Shake as hero center-frame. Slight condensation/mist effect. Brand color props (pink napkin, blue straw). Minimal text — let the visual speak. Shot in portrait for feed.
posts.productionNotes: PHOTO POST — Cinematic product photography. This shot also feeds into Pack B (in-store screen content). Shoot multiple angles.

posts.title: Sunday Deserves Dessertino 🍨
posts.caption:
Your Sunday plans just got an upgrade 🍨

Grab your crew. Pick your shake. Make it a Dessertino kind of Sunday.

Because weekends are made for thick shakes and zero regrets 😌

📍 Walk in or order from home
💬 Tag your Sunday dessert buddy!
posts.visualDirection: Bright, warm tones. Lifestyle montage — friends sharing shakes, couple on a dessert date, family dine-in moment. Mix of dine-in + delivery unboxing shots. Upbeat trending audio. 15-30s.
posts.productionNotes: REEL #3 — Lifestyle/vibe reel. Can use UGC-style footage. Posts on Sunday for relevance.

posts.title: Dessertino vs. Your Regular Shake
posts.caption:
Still drinking boring shakes? 😴

Swipe to see what you're missing → 

Dessertino doesn't do basic. We do LOADED.

🔥 Thick. Rich. Over-the-top. The way a shake should be.

📍 Dessertino — Shakes and More
💬 Regular or Dessertino? Be honest 👇
posts.visualDirection: 4 slides. Slide 1: Hook — 'Your shake vs Dessertino shake'. Slide 2: Split — plain boring shake (desaturated) vs Dessertino shake (vibrant, brand colors, loaded). Slide 3: Close-up of toppings/drizzle. Slide 4: CTA + logo.
posts.productionNotes: CAROUSEL — Design-heavy post. Comparison format performs well. Can be designed using existing product shots.

posts.title: Behind the Scenes — How we make the magic 🎬
posts.caption:
Ever wondered what goes into your favourite shake? 👀

Spoiler: It's a lot of love, a lot of cream, and zero shortcuts.

Watch how Dessertino crafts every shake from scratch 🤌

📍 Dessertino — Shakes and More
🔖 Save this for your next craving!
posts.visualDirection: Close-up macro shots. Ingredients going in → blending (slow-mo) → pouring into glass → topping drizzle → final hero reveal. ASMR-style audio (no music or optional lo-fi). Clean counter, branded elements visible. 20-40s.
posts.productionNotes: REEL #4 — Satisfying/process content. Performs great for saves & shares. Footage also feeds Pack B screen content.

posts.title: Thank You Pune — This was just the beginning 🚀
posts.caption:
2 weeks. 8 posts. And Pune showed up like we hoped you would ❤️

This was just the warm-up.

Dessertino has something bigger coming... 👀

Stay tuned. Stay hungry.

📍 Dessertino — Shakes and More
🔔 Turn on notifications so you don't miss it!
posts.visualDirection: Highlight reel compilation — best moments from all trial content. Fast-paced edits synced to music. Brand colors throughout. Final 3 seconds: mystery/teaser frame with logo + 'Coming Soon'. Push to Stories with countdown sticker.
posts.productionNotes: REEL #5 + STORY PUSH — Trial wrap post. Teases monthly retainer continuation. Use best clips from 2 weeks. Push hard on Stories for retention.

packB.title: In-Store Screen Content
packB.description: Hero shots from selected posts repurposed for in-store vertical screen loops
sources: Post #7 (BTS) — Process footage to trigger cravings
goals: Drive impulse purchases at point of sale
